articles.title: HDSC Releases New Ultra-Low Power MCU Series with Sub-μA Standby
articles.summary: HDSC announces the HC32L196 series ultra-low power MCUs featuring 0.5μA standby current and advanced security features for IoT applications.
articles.content:
HDSC has officially released the HC32L196 series ultra-low power microcontrollers, setting new standards for energy efficiency in battery-powered applications. The new series achieves an industry-leading 0.5μA standby current while maintaining RTC operation and RAM retention.

## Key Features

- **Sub-μA Standby**: 0.5μA typical with RTC running
- **Fast Wake-up**: 4μs from deep sleep to active mode
- **Advanced Security**: Hardware encryption engine and secure boot
- **Rich Peripherals**: LCD driver, 12-bit ADC, multiple communication interfaces
- **Extended Temperature**: -40°C to +85°C operation

## Target Applications

The HC32L196 series is ideal for:
- Smart meters and utility applications
- Wearable devices and health monitors
- IoT sensors and wireless nodes
- Battery-powered industrial devices
- Smart home products

## Availability

LiTong, as an authorized HDSC distributor, now stocks the HC32L196 series in various packages including LQFP64, LQFP48, and QFN32. Engineering samples and evaluation boards are available immediately.

articles.title: HDSC Achieves AEC-Q100 Grade 1 Certification for Automotive MCU Series
articles.summary: HDSC's HC32A series automotive MCUs receive AEC-Q100 Grade 1 certification, expanding opportunities in automotive electronics market.
articles.content:
HDSC has successfully achieved AEC-Q100 Grade 1 certification for its HC32A series automotive microcontrollers, marking a significant milestone in the company's expansion into the automotive electronics market.

## Certification Details

The AEC-Q100 Grade 1 certification validates that HC32A series MCUs meet stringent quality and reliability standards for automotive applications:

- **Temperature Range**: -40°C to +125°C
- **Reliability**: Full automotive qualification testing
- **Quality**: Zero defect quality management
- **Traceability**: Full lot traceability and documentation

## HC32A Series Features

The automotive-qualified series includes:
- HC32A460: High-performance Cortex-M4 for body control
- HC32A136: Cost-effective solution for sensor interfaces

Key automotive features:
- Dual CAN-FD interfaces
- LIN bus support
- Enhanced EMC performance
- Lock-step CPU option for safety applications
- ECC memory protection

## Market Impact

This certification enables HDSC to serve Tier-1 automotive suppliers and OEMs with qualified products for body electronics, sensor interfaces, and control applications. LiTong provides full PPAP documentation and long-term supply support for automotive customers.

articles.title: HDSC Releases Version 2.0 Motor Control Library with Enhanced FOC
articles.summary: New motor control library features improved sensorless FOC algorithm, auto-tuning capabilities, and support for high-speed motors up to 150,000 RPM.
articles.content:
HDSC has released version 2.0 of its motor control library, featuring significant improvements in sensorless field-oriented control (FOC) and expanded support for high-speed motor applications.

## Version 2.0 Highlights

### Enhanced Sensorless FOC
- Improved observer stability at low speeds
- Better dynamic response during load transients
- Reduced torque ripple
- Support for salient-pole motors

### Auto-Tuning Features
- Automatic motor parameter identification
- Self-tuning current controllers
- Speed loop auto-tuning wizard
- One-click commissioning

### High-Speed Support
- Extended speed range up to 150,000 RPM
- Improved high-frequency injection
- Enhanced flux weakening control

### New Motor Types
- Interior permanent magnet (IPM) motors
- Surface permanent magnet (SPM) motors
- Synchronous reluctance motors

## Tools Integration

The new library integrates seamlessly with HDSC Motor Control Workbench 2.0, providing:
- Graphical parameter configuration
- Real-time tuning and monitoring
- Automated test sequences
- Code generation

## Availability

The motor control library v2.0 is available now as a free download for HDSC MCU users. LiTong provides technical support and training for motor control applications.

articles.title: HDSC Launches HC32F4A0 Series for High-Performance Industrial Applications
articles.summary: New 240MHz Cortex-M4 MCU series targets industrial automation with advanced analog, Ethernet, and functional safety features.
articles.content:
HDSC has launched the HC32F4A0 series high-performance microcontrollers designed specifically for demanding industrial applications. The new series features a 240MHz ARM Cortex-M4 core with comprehensive connectivity and analog capabilities.

## HC32F4A0 Series Features

### High Performance
- 240MHz ARM Cortex-M4 with FPU
- 512KB Flash with ECC
- 96KB SRAM
- Memory protection unit (MPU)

### Advanced Analog
- 12-bit ADC: 2.5Msps, 16 channels
- 12-bit DAC: 2 channels
- Analog comparators: 3
- Operational amplifiers: 2

### Connectivity
- Ethernet 10/100 MAC with DMA
- USB 2.0 OTG FS
- CAN-FD x2
- UART/USART x6
- SPI x3, I2C x3

### Industrial Features
- Extended temperature: -40°C to +85°C
- 5V-tolerant GPIO
- Enhanced ESD protection
- Watchdog timers

## Target Applications

- PLC controllers
- Industrial gateways
- Motion controllers
- HMI panels
- Process control systems

## Development Support

HDSC provides comprehensive development support including:
- HC32F4A0-EVAL evaluation board
- Industrial communication stacks
- PLC runtime library
- Reference designs

LiTong has the HC32F4A0 series in stock with immediate availability.

articles.title: HDSC Enhances MCU Security Features for IoT Applications
articles.summary: New security features include hardware encryption, secure boot, and tamper detection to address growing IoT security requirements.
articles.content:
HDSC has announced enhanced security features across its MCU portfolio to address the growing security requirements of IoT and connected device applications. The new security capabilities provide robust protection against common attack vectors.

## Security Features Overview

### Hardware Encryption
- AES-128/256 hardware accelerator
- DES/3DES support
- SHA-256 hash engine
- Random number generator (TRNG)

### Secure Boot
- Root of trust establishment
- Firmware authentication
- Secure firmware update
- Rollback protection

### Tamper Detection
- Voltage tamper monitoring
- Temperature tamper detection
- External tamper pins
- Active shield for sensitive signals

### Memory Protection
- Execute-only memory regions
- Secure RAM partitions
- Flash readout protection
- Debug port disable

## Implementation

These security features are available in:
- HC32L196 series (ultra-low power)
- HC32F460 series (high-performance)
- HC32A series (automotive)

## Security Resources

HDSC provides:
- Security application notes
- Secure boot reference code
- Cryptography library
- Security best practices guide

LiTong offers security consulting services to help customers implement appropriate security measures for their applications.
